title: Meadow's Better Food
description: Food look tasty and realistic now!
body:
Version 2.0 is out now! --- Enhance your Minecraft experience with Meadow's Better Food!
This pack features: - **3d**-looking and **juicy meat**, - **shiny** glowberries and apples, - **slim carrots**, - **matte beetroot**, - **realistic** poisonous potatoes and mushroom stew, - **and more** while **staying true to** the **vanilla** style!

This pack is licensed under CC-BY-NC-ND. You are allowed to use and share it as long as you credit me, do not use it commercially and do not make any modifications.
